result: {"schema_version": 1, "pass": false, "review_status": "completed", "summary": "安裝驗證指令 `python -m cold_eyes doctor` 無法執行——缺少 `__main__.py`，正確指令應為 `cold-eyes doctor`", "issues": [{"severity": "major", "confidence": "high", "category": "correctness", "file": "docs/安裝說明.md", "line_hint": "L5", "check": "步驟 3 指示使用者執行 `python -m cold_eyes doctor`，但套件缺少 `cold_eyes/__main__.py`，該指令會報 `No module named cold_eyes.__main__`。pyproject.toml 註冊的 console_scripts 入口是 `cold-eyes = cold_eyes.cli:main`", "verdict": "文件中的驗證指令無法執行，使用者會誤以為安裝失敗", "fix": "改為 `cold-eyes doctor`（pip install 後可用的 CLI 入口），或新增 `cold_eyes/__main__.py` 使 `python -m` 路徑也能運作"}]}
